item.title: Time for New Farm Projects
item.description: Explore the start of new farm projects, showcasing planning, equipment setup, and strategies to improve productivity and efficiency on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Time for New Farm Projects
media:content.media:description: Explore the start of new farm projects, showcasing planning, equipment setup, and strategies to improve productivity and efficiency on the farm.

item.title: Why the Farm Equipment Was Traded
item.description: Learn the reasons behind trading farm equipment, highlighting considerations, benefits, and decisions that impact efficiency and operations on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Why the Farm Equipment Was Traded
media:content.media:description: Learn the reasons behind trading farm equipment, highlighting considerations, benefits, and decisions that impact efficiency and operations on the farm.

item.title: A Rare Moment on the Farm
item.description: Capture a unique and uncommon moment on the farm, showcasing special events, rare sights, or unexpected occurrences in daily agricultural life.

media:content.media:title: A Rare Moment on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Capture a unique and uncommon moment on the farm, showcasing special events, rare sights, or unexpected occurrences in daily agricultural life.

item.title: A Careful Equipment Test
item.description: Watch a detailed equipment test on the farm, highlighting safety, precision, and techniques to ensure machinery operates efficiently and reliably.

media:content.media:title: A Careful Equipment Test
media:content.media:description: Watch a detailed equipment test on the farm, highlighting safety, precision, and techniques to ensure machinery operates efficiently and reliably.

item.title: A Close Call at the Farm Shed
item.description: Witness a near-miss at the farm shed, highlighting safety awareness, quick thinking, and the importance of caution when handling farm equipment and daily tasks.

media:content.media:title: A Close Call at the Farm Shed
media:content.media:description: Witness a near-miss at the farm shed, highlighting safety awareness, quick thinking, and the importance of caution when handling farm equipment and daily tasks.

item.title: A Head in Action on the Farm
item.description: See farm machinery or equipment in action, showcasing efficiency, movement, and techniques that keep operations running smoothly during daily agricultural work.

media:content.media:title: A Head in Action on the Farm
media:content.media:description: See farm machinery or equipment in action, showcasing efficiency, movement, and techniques that keep operations running smoothly during daily agricultural work.

item.title: A John Deere Quirk on the Farm
item.description: Explore a unique feature or quirk of a John Deere tractor, highlighting its function, practical impact, and insights for smooth and efficient farm operations.

media:content.media:title: A John Deere Quirk on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Explore a unique feature or quirk of a John Deere tractor, highlighting its function, practical impact, and insights for smooth and efficient farm operations.

item.title: Farm Equipment Upgrade
item.description: Watch the process of upgrading farm equipment, showcasing improvements, techniques, and the benefits of enhanced machinery for more efficient farming operations.

media:content.media:title: Farm Equipment Upgrade
media:content.media:description: Watch the process of upgrading farm equipment, showcasing improvements, techniques, and the benefits of enhanced machinery for more efficient farming operations.

item.title: Recovering a Stolen Vehicle on the Farm
item.description: See the discovery and recovery of a stolen vehicle on the farm, highlighting the process, precautions, and steps taken to ensure security and safety.

media:content.media:title: Recovering a Stolen Vehicle on the Farm
media:content.media:description: See the discovery and recovery of a stolen vehicle on the farm, highlighting the process, precautions, and steps taken to ensure security and safety.

item.title: How Did That Come Apart?
item.description: Explore how an object unexpectedly came apart, revealing construction, weak points, and the process behind its separation in a surprising or informative demonstration.

media:content.media:title: How Did That Come Apart?
media:content.media:description: Explore how an object unexpectedly came apart, revealing construction, weak points, and the process behind its separation in a surprising or informative demonstration.

item.title: Important Farm Decisions
item.description: See key decisions being made on the farm, highlighting planning, strategy, and problem-solving that impact operations, efficiency, and productivity.

media:content.media:title: Important Farm Decisions
media:content.media:description: See key decisions being made on the farm, highlighting planning, strategy, and problem-solving that impact operations, efficiency, and productivity.

item.title: Behind the Scenes on the Farm
item.description: Take a look behind the scenes on the farm, showcasing daily tasks, equipment use, and the effort that goes into keeping farm operations running smoothly.

media:content.media:title: Behind the Scenes on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Take a look behind the scenes on the farm, showcasing daily tasks, equipment use, and the effort that goes into keeping farm operations running smoothly.

item.title: Brand New CAT Tractor Arrives
item.description: Watch the arrival of a new CAT tractor on the farm, highlighting its features, setup, and how it will enhance efficiency and productivity in farm operations.

media:content.media:title: Brand New CAT Tractor Arrives
media:content.media:description: Watch the arrival of a new CAT tractor on the farm, highlighting its features, setup, and how it will enhance efficiency and productivity in farm operations.
